message:
feat(pool): WAL/SHM sidecar recovery instead of hard refusal

Rewrite refuse_auto_recovery_with_live_sidecars to attempt recovery
before refusing:
1. Try PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) to fold WAL into main DB
2. If checkpoint succeeds, remove sidecars and proceed
3. If lock error, report another process holds the DB
4. If other failure, try direct sidecar file deletion

Additional improvements:
- Quarantine path namespace generalization (corrupt, archive-reconcile,
  reconstruct) with labeled quarantine/restore helpers
- Path resolution safety: missing relative path returned as-is instead
  of being rewritten as absolute path to wrong location
- Zero-byte WAL cleanup before health checks to avoid unnecessary
  full backup/reinit recovery
- ~15 new tests covering sidecar recovery, quarantine paths, archive
  reconciliation, missing-path resolution, and zero-byte WAL cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
